channel.title: Raspi on Bogdan Penkovsky, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Raspi on Bogdan Penkovsky, PhD

item.title: Connecting To Raspberry Pi Over WiFi
item.description: Raspberry Pi is great. It is a small and cheap computer that can be used for a variety of projects. Sometimes you may wish to remotely control a Rasperry Pi that is in your local WiFi network. This is possible and even quite easy. We will use a Secure Shell aka SSH to establish a remote connection. I assume that you have previously connected your Raspberry Pi board to a WiFi network.
